title: The Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu (Merger of Union territories) Act, 2019
full_text: The Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu (Merger of Union territories) Act, 2019 दादरा और नागर हवेली तथा दमण और दीव (संघ राज्यकक्षेत्रों का विलयन) अधिनियम, 2019 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201944 Act Number: 44 Enactment Date: 2019-12-09 Act Year: 2019 Short Title: The Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu (Merger of Union territories) Act, 2019 Hindi Title: दादरा और नागर हवेली तथा दमण और दीव (संघ राज्यकक्षेत्रों का विलयन) अधिनियम, 2019 Long Title: An Act to provide for merger of Union territories of Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Home Affairs Department: Department of Home Enforcement Date: 26-01-2020 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu (Merger of Union territories) Act, 2019 PART I PRELIMINARY PART II MERGER OF UNION TERRITORIES PART III REPRESENTATION IN THE HOUSE OF THE PEOPLE PART IV HIGH COURT PART V ASSETS AND LIABILITIES PART VI PROVISIONS AS TO SERVICES PART VII LEGAL AND MISCELLANEOUS PROVISIONS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Formation of Union territory of Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu. Section 4. Amendment of article 240 of Constitution. Section 5. Amendment of First Schedule to Constitution. Section 6. Allocation of seats in House of People. Section 7. Provisions as to sitting members. Section 8. Extension of jurisdiction of High Court of Bombay. Section 9. Land and goods. Section 10. Cash balances. Section 11. Arrears of tax. Section 12. Right to recover loans and advances. Section 13. Assets and liabilities of Union territory undertakings. Section 14. Refund of taxes collected in excess. Section 15. Provisions relating to All India Services. Section 16. Provisions relating to other services. Section 17. Extension of laws. Section 18. Power to construe laws. Section 19. Power to adapt laws. Section 20. Legal proceedings. Section 21. Transfer of pending proceeding. Section 22. Effect of provisions inconsistent with other laws. Section 23. Power to remove difficulties.
